title: Fufu with Peanut Soup
ingredients: Yams or Cassava, Water, Peanut butter, Meat or Fish, Spices
instructions:
1. Boil and pound the yams until doughy.
2. Prepare peanut soup with meat and spices.
3. Serve fufu balls in the soup.

title: Ablo
ingredients: Corn flour, Rice flour, Sugar, Yeast, Water
instructions:
1. Mix flours with water, yeast, and sugar.
2. Let ferment for several hours.
3. Steam in small molds until fluffy.

title: Jollof Rice
ingredients: Rice, Tomatoes, Onions, Peppers, Spices, Oil
instructions:
1. Sauté onions and peppers.
2. Add tomato paste and spices.
3. Add rice and broth, then simmer until cooked.
